comp-1.description: Shows a stream of news headlines relevant to assets along with sentiment scores and match percentage.

comp-2.description: Shows a correlation heatmap between FX pairs (and optionally commodities). 'labels' defines the row/column names and 'matrix' is a square N×N matrix of correlation values from -1 to 1.

comp-3.description: Shows recommended allocation across asset classes

comp-5.description: Shows critical alerts(one or more) relevant to forex trading/stocks/bonds.

comp-6.description: Shows the DV01 and PVBP value for one or more bonds

comp-7.description: Displays Monte Carlo simulation metrics for a stock including percentiles, risk measures, distribution statistics, and simulation parameters.

data.title: Asset Performance
data.subtitle: Key instruments and their recent performance

comp-8.description: Shows a generic list of assets with current price and performance, usable for equities, bonds, FX, or any other instrument.

comp-9.description: Shows portfolio-level free cash and invested amount, primarily for portfolio views but can be reused for other asset groupings in specific prompts.

comp-10.description: Displays high-level liquidity metrics and cash position for a portfolio or treasury system.

fundamentals.label: string
fundamentals.value: value for the label, can be number/string

technical.label: string
technical.value: value for the label, can be number/string

comp-11.description: Shows fundamental and technical metrics for a stock. For example, fundamentals label can include Sector, Market Cap, P/E, EPS, Debt/Equity, ROE; technicals can include RSI, moving averages, Bollinger Bands, support and resistance.

data.sentimentScore: can be a number with tag(ex. neutral, bearish etc)

comp-12.description: Displays a summarized sentiment score and reasoning generated from analysis of market or asset signals.

comp-13.description: Displays current market value, invested amount, and high/low range for a stock or asset.

comp-14.description: Shows the stock name, daily price movement, and timestamped market context.

comp-15.description: Displays key bond terms such as coupon rate, maturity date, coupon frequency, next coupon date, face value, rating and settlement convention.

comp-16.description: Shows the current bond quote including last price and daily change, bid/ask levels, bid-ask spread, clean and dirty prices, and accrued interest.

comp-17.description: Shows period-wise cash inflows, outflows, net cash flow, opening/ending balances, and Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR %) for treasury or liquidity monitoring. Can have many rows.

items.label: string (metric or field name)
items.helperText: string (optional extra context, e.g. 'vs last month')

comp-18.description: Generic key-value card used to render small sets of metrics or facts for any asset, portfolio, or context when no specialised component exists.

points.amount: number (cash balance in raw units, e.g. 22000000)

comp-19.description: Shows a 30-day projected cash balance trend.

comp-20.description: Shows the FX rate over time for a specific currency pair, with range filters for 1W, 1M, 1Y, and YTD.

points.date: string (ISO date or any valid date format, e.g. '2025-02-01')
points.open: number (optional — opening price for the day)
points.close: number (optional — closing price for the day)

comp-21.description: Renders a candlestick chart showing high/low ranges for each day, and optionally open and close values. Intended for stocks but compatible with any instrument that has daily price ranges.

comp-22.description: Shows the bond yield over time (1Y window), plotted as a line chart with date on the x-axis.

points.rate: number (x-axis, e.g. coupon or risk-free rate)

comp-23.description: Shows the relationship between rate and yield as a scatter/curve chart (1Y view).

points.price: number (clean or close price for that day)

comp-24.description: Shows the bond price over time (1Y), plotted as a line chart with index-based x-axis. Dates are shown only in the tooltip.
